summary: Frontend testing of KYC and KYB form pages. Both forms render correctly without JavaScript crashes. Portuguese translations display correctly on all labels, buttons, and progress steps. Navigation between steps works as expected.

issues: Minor React warning: span cannot be child of option element - appears in select dropdown. Non-blocking cosmetic issue.

critical_code_review_comments: KYC Form renders correctly - STEPS constant and stepMap fix working properly
KYB Form renders correctly with complete Portuguese translations
Progress steps display correctly with 4 steps each form
Form labels, upload instructions, and button text all in Portuguese

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Both KYC and KYB forms render and function correctly

test_user_1.note: Has KYC data, on final step (Address Proof)

test_user_2.note: Has KYB data, on final step (Address Proof)

context_for_next_testing_agent: KYC and KYB forms are fully functional. Both users (joao@teste.com and maria@teste.com) have existing KYC/KYB data and are on the final step (Address Proof). Forms show Portuguese translations correctly. The STEPS constant bug is fixed.

kyc_form_rendering.details: Form renders without JavaScript crash at /dashboard/kyc/kyc

kyb_form_rendering.details: Form renders without JavaScript crash at /dashboard/kyc/kyb

progress_steps_kyc.details: 4 steps displayed correctly: Dados Pessoais, Documento ID, Selfie, Morada

progress_steps_kyb.details: 4 steps displayed correctly: Dados da Empresa, Documentos, Representantes, Comprovativo

back_button_navigation.details: Back button (Voltar) navigates correctly between steps

mocked_apis.note: Dashboard financial data (Portfolio, Wallets, Transactions) is MOCKED as documented. KYC/KYB APIs are real.
